nasb.text: Indeed Babylon is to fall for the slain of Israel, As also for Babylon the slain of all the earth have fallen.

esv.text: Babylon must fall for the slain of Israel, just as for Babylon have fallen the slain of all the earth.

cnv.text: “巴比倫必因以色列被刺殺的人而倒下， 就如全地被刺殺的人因巴比倫而倒下。

ccb.text: 巴比伦必灭亡， 因为她大肆屠杀以色列人和其他各国的人。
